title: Did they ever use the term Technology of God
display_title: Did they ever use the term Technology of God
wikitext:
[]: Did they ever use the term "Technology of God"?             Quote Post by Conrad Gray » Thu Oct 26, 2006 1:27 pm I've read a few fics that call Evangelions and Eva-related tech as "the technology of God." Though they never really mention God, that's the name. Was it ever used in the original series? Anyone have an idea where it came from?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Oct 26, 2006 1:42 pm They mention "Kami" and "Kami-sama" a bit. They stand, sort of, for gods as the the greek pantheon of gods, or simply "higher ups" in the karmic scale of signifigance. They also make mention of how they don't quite understand the properties and technology behind the Eva's and Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 26, 2006 2:00 pm I shudder every time I hear the G word in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Oct 26, 2006 2:11 pm I can't recall acutely, being that I haven't had the DVDs in my posession for over a year, but I vaguely remember "technology of God" being a phrase clarified somewhere in the D&R bonus materials.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Oct 26, 2006 2:16 pm The nearest I can recall is in this sort of ominous muttering by SEELE (here, from ep#21) where it is the product and not the means that are being labelled as transhuman 02: With an S2 engine on board, Evangelion Unit 01 has become an absolute being! 03: We have no use for an actualized god. KEEL: We must not create a god. ##: We cannot allow that man to create a god. Gendo Ikari, is he a man that can be trusted?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Oct 26, 2006 2:59 pm It flashes by while Shinji is inside Leliel tho I think you can only read it in the dub unless you know Japanese

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 26, 2006 9:50 pm C-247A, Image 40/41: kami no gijutsu From the procession of newspaper clippings addressing AEL-related conspiracies, Yui's death, and the aftermath.
